title: malaxis khasiana
intro: Malaxis khasiana, also known as the Himalayan orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Malaxis khasiana are attributed to its ability to treat various ailments, including fever, headache, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat these conditions.
